basic_details.job_title: Telangana Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 163 Anganwadi Teacher & Helper Posts in Medak District
basic_details.organization_name: District Welfare Officer, Women & Child Welfare (WCD & Sc) Department, Medak District, Telangana
basic_details.short_information: The District Welfare Officer, Women & Child Welfare Department, Medak District, Telangana, has released Notification No. 449/EO/2026, dated 07-07-2026, for filling vacant posts of Anganwadi Worker/Teacher (AWT) and Anganwadi Helper/Ayah (AWH) across the Alladurg, Medak, Narsapur, and Ramayampet ICDS projects in Medak district. Based on the official vacancy sheets issued alongside the notification, a total of 76 AWT vacancies and 87 AWH vacancies - 163 posts in all - have been notified. Eligible women candidates can apply online through the Women Development and Child Welfare Department's websi

how_to_apply: Check the notified vacancies for your relevant ICDS project (Alladurg, Medak, Narsapur, or Ramayampet) and Anganwadi Centre.
Review the eligibility criteria and other rules published on the website before applying.
Submit your application online only, between 10-07-2026 and 24-07-2026, up to 5:00 PM.
Ensure all details entered are accurate before final submission, since corrections cannot be made once the application process is completed.
Applications submitted physically at any office, or sent by post, will not be considered - only online applications through the official website will be accepted.
For further details, contact the CDPO office of the relevant ICDS project (for example, the Narsapur ICDS Project CDPO office for Narsapur project vacancies).
important_instructions: Applications must be submitted online only; applications submitted physically at any office or sent by post will not be considered. Once the online application process is completed, the submitted details cannot be changed. The District Collector, Medak, will not be responsible for late applications, or for any request regarding correction of details after submission. Only women candidates are eligible to apply for these posts. Anganwadi Ayah/Helper vacancies in certain projects (for example, Narsapur) are specified as applicable to tribal areas only. For eligibility, rules, and other details, candidates must refer to http://wdcw.tg.nic.in.

content_sections.heading: Medak Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: All Anganwadi Centre-wise vacancy entries in the official vacancy sheets carry the same "From Date" of 10.07.2026 and "To Date" of 24.07.2026, consistent with the dates reported by local newspapers.

rows.date: Not specified in the source documents
Not specified in the source documents

content_sections.heading: Medak Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Project-Wise Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Based on the official AWT and AWH vacancy sheets (Notification No. 449/EO/2026), the project-wise vacancy count is as follows: Note on the Ramayampet/"ICDS Project" label: In the official AWT vacancy sheet, the last set of 29 entries (serial numbers 48 to 76) is listed under the project name "ICDS Project" rather than a specific project name. Based on the Anganwadi Centre ID range (1708xxx), which matches the ID series used for Ramayampet in the AWH vacancy sheet, and based on consistency with a newspaper report (Namaste Telangana, 08-07-2026) that states 29 Anganwadi Teacher and 9 Ayah vacancies for the Ramayampet ICDS project, this set of entries very likely corresponds to the Ramayampet project. However, the official sheet itself does not explicitly label it as "Ramayampet," so this connection is noted here as an inference, not a confirmed fact from the source document. Different newspapers reported slightly different vacancy figures for the Narsapur ICDS project on 08-07-2026: Prajasakti, Nava Telangana, Disha, and Sakshyam reported 23 Anganwadi Teacher posts (all areas) and 56 Anganwadi Ayah posts (tribal areas only) for the Narsapur project - this matches the official vacancy sheet exactly (23 AWT + 56 AWH = 79). Sakshi's report, however, stated 23 Anganwadi Teacher and 59 Ayah posts for the Narsapur project - a figure that does not match the official vacancy sheet's count of 56 AWH vacancies for Narsapur. This article follows the official vacancy sheet figures (23 AWT, 56 AWH for Narsapur) as the authoritative source, since they are drawn directly from the district's Anganwadi Centre-wise vacancy data rather than a news summary.

rows.project_name: Ramayampet (listed as "ICDS Project" in the AWT sheet - see note below)

content_sections.heading: Eligibility
content_sections.text: Only women candidates are eligible to apply, as stated in the press notice. Anganwadi Ayah/Helper (AWH) vacancies in the Narsapur project are specified as being in tribal areas only . Detailed eligibility criteria, educational qualification, and other rules are not specified in the source documents provided. Candidates are directed to check http://wdcw.tg.nic.in for eligibility and other rules, as explicitly stated in the official press notice.

rows.qualification: Intermediate pass; if no Intermediate-qualified candidate is available, SSC (10th)-passed candidates will be considered for selection

content_sections.heading: Medak Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The detailed selection process (such as merit criteria, interview, or written test) is not specified in the source documents provided. The press notice does state the following procedural points: The District Collector, Medak, has full authority over the recruitment process. The Commissioner/District Collector will not be responsible for late applications, or for requests regarding corrections or changes to submitted applications. Once an application is completed and submitted online, its details cannot be changed.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: The list of documents required to be submitted along with the online application is not specified in the source documents provided. Candidates should check http://wdcw.tg.nic.in for the required document list.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Medak Anganwadi Teacher/Ayah Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official website: http://wdcw.tg.nic.in . Check the notified vacancies for your relevant ICDS project (Alladurg, Medak, Narsapur, or Ramayampet) and Anganwadi Centre. Review the eligibility criteria and other rules published on the website before applying. Submit your application online only , between 10-07-2026 and 24-07-2026 , up to 5:00 PM . Ensure all details entered are accurate before final submission, since corrections cannot be made once the application process is completed. Applications submitted physically at any office, or sent by post, will not be considered - only online applications through the official website will be accepted. For further details, contact the CDPO office of the relevant ICDS project (for example, the Narsapur ICDS Project CDPO office for Narsapur project vacancies).

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online only ; applications submitted physically at any office or sent by post will not be considered. Once the online application process is completed, the submitted details cannot be changed . The District Collector, Medak, will not be responsible for late applications, or for any request regarding correction of details after submission. Only women candidates are eligible to apply for these posts. Anganwadi Ayah/Helper vacancies in certain projects (for example, Narsapur) are specified as applicable to tribal areas only . For eligibility, rules, and other details, candidates must refer to http://wdcw.tg.nic.in.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Medak district Anganwadi Teacher and Ayah recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window is from 10-07-2026 to 24-07-2026, up to 5:00 PM, as per Notification No. 449/EO/2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many Anganwadi Teacher and Ayah vacancies are there in Medak district?
faq.answer: Based on the official vacancy sheets, there are 76 Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) vacancies and 87 Anganwadi Ayah/Helper (AWH) vacancies, totaling 163 posts, across the Alladurg, Medak, Narsapur, and Ramayampet ICDS projects.

faq.question: Q3. How many Anganwadi Teacher and Ayah vacancies are there in the Narsapur project specifically?
faq.answer: According to the official vacancy sheet, there are 23 Anganwadi Teacher vacancies and 56 Anganwadi Ayah vacancies (in tribal areas only) for the Narsapur ICDS project. Note that one newspaper (Sakshi) reported 59 Ayah vacancies for Narsapur, which does not match the official vacancy sheet's figure of 56.

faq.question: Q4. Can men apply for these posts?
faq.answer: No. The press notice specifies that applications are invited from eligible women candidates only.

faq.question: Q5. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: Only online applications through http://wdcw.tg.nic.in will be accepted. Applications submitted physically at any office, or sent by post, will not be considered.

faq.question: Q6. Can I correct my application after submitting it?
faq.answer: No. As per the notice, once the online application process is completed, the details submitted cannot be changed.
